sections.label: Intro bars 1-2 (doubt): fully silent -- Cm9 held, stillness, no drums at all
Intro bars 3-4 (doubt): a single soft hi-hat pulse hints the pocket without committing, under the Rhodes hook fragment
A1 bars 5-11 (doubt): groove enters but stays minimal -- round kick, dusty rimshot backbeat, hat with a gap left in it, no ghost-note pileup
A1 bar 12 (doubt, close): the section's unresolved hanging bar -- drums drop to a bare kick pulse, echoing the suspended G7sus

B bars 13-16 (turning): the one modest lift in the piece -- hat opens up to steady 8ths plus a single open-hat accent at the bar's end, kick gains one extra syncopated hit; still no ride/cymbal wash and no tutti hit -- restrained, per the brief's 'not a big triumphant ending'
Outro bars 17-22 (acceptance): subtraction -- kick drops out entirely, only a sparse rimshot and a bare hat pulse remain, tapering the groove toward silence
Outro bar 23 (acceptance, tag): one last, barely-there rimshot echo, timed with the sax's faint closing fragment
Outro bar 24 (acceptance, final): fully silent -- the piece settles on the held Cm9 alone, space, no drums at all, no triumphant final hit
